No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to health outcomes, disease prevention, or well-being initiatives.

Quality Education.reason: The course is designed for PhD students to acquire advanced research skills and become scholars, directly aligning with targets for quality tertiary education (4.3) and relevant skills for employment (4.4).
evidence: This course is prepared to help PhD. Students become a researcher and scholar.
Teach students various kinds of research methods
這是一個強調「做中學」、不尚空談的課程，希望幫助每一位博士生成為真正的研究生

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to gender equality, discrimination, or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to water access, sanitation, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course equips PhD students with research and publication skills, fostering innovation and contributing to higher economic productivity and decent job creation in research (Targets 8.2, 8.3).
evidence: 習得研究方法並進行獨立研究之能力 (Students will acquire the knowledge of methodology and independent research skills)
撰述表達及學術研究發表能力 (Students will develop communication skills and publish academic research papers)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is offered by a 'Graduate Institute of Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management' and focuses on scientific research methods, including AI, directly supporting innovation and technological capabilities (Targets 9.5, 9.b).
evidence: Graduate Institute of Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to reducing inequalities in income, social inclusion, or discriminatory practices.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to urban development, housing, transport, or cultural heritage.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: A core competency involves understanding and applying 'social responsibility and sustainability considerations in research,' which indirectly supports sustainable practices (Target 12.6).
evidence: Understand and apply the social responsibility and sustainability considerations in research
理解並運用社會責任與永續議題

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, pollution, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly covers 'Ethics in Research' and complying with 'ethics of Academy,' contributing to developing accountable and transparent academic institutions (Target 16.6).
evidence: Ethics in Research with Special Reference to Social Sciences
comply with the ethics of Academy

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course aims to integrate students into the 'Academic Community' and encourages 'Attending Conference,' fostering knowledge-sharing and multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.16).
evidence: Becoming a member of Academic Community
Attending Conference of Society for Management of Technology
協助學生參與學術研究的社群
